name: SurveyMonkey
description: SurveyMonkey online survey platform for employee and customer feedback

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to SurveyMonkey
2. Go to My Account → Developer Apps
3. Create an app and complete the OAuth flow
4. Paste your access token below

credentialFields.label: Access Token
credentialFields.helpText: SurveyMonkey → My Account → Developer Apps → OAuth Access Token

checks.name: Employee Access
checks.description: Lists SurveyMonkey surveys to verify employee feedback platform access
